title: Morning Brief Engine — Daily Agentic Action List
description: Replace weekly digest as primary touchpoint. Daily 8am (user timezone): prioritized action list via email (DO SMTP) + persisted in-app brief. OUT OF SCOPE: auto-sending follow-ups, Web Push (email + in-app notification for v1).

userStories.title: User timezone and morning brief preferences
userStories.description: User fields: timezone (IANA), morning_brief_enabled (default true), morning_brief_hour (8), morning_brief_email, morning_brief_in_app, weekly_digest_enabled (default false). PATCH /api/auth/me. SettingsNotificationsSection timezone select + toggles.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings UI for timezone and brief toggles

userStories.title: Morning brief aggregator service
userStories.description: backend/notifications/morning_brief.py: build_morning_brief(user_id) assembles sections — follow_ups, interviews (prep_ready flag), high_matches, pending_approvals, summary_line. generate_and_store_brief upserts morning_briefs collection {user_id, date YYYY-MM-DD local, sections, summary_line, created_at}. Unique index (user_id, date).

userStories.title: Timezone-aware daily scheduler job
userStories.description: APScheduler job morning_brief hourly at :15 UTC. send_due_morning_briefs() checks each user's local hour, generates brief once per local date, sends email if enabled, creates morning_brief_ready notification. Gate weekly digest on weekly_digest_enabled.
acceptanceCriteria: Timezone dedup one brief per local date

userStories.title: Morning brief email template
userStories.description: format_morning_brief_email(brief) plain text via SMTP. Subject: 'Your Pipelined morning brief — {summary}'. Links to /brief and detail panels. No mailto auto-send.

userStories.title: GET /api/brief/today endpoint
userStories.description: brief_router.py: GET /today (on-demand gen if missing, 3/hour limit), GET /history?days=7. Auth required, user_id scoped. Register in main.py.
